textPlain: Combining the GuitarPie with the Voystick (vocal joystick) would rock!Keyboard and voice navigation, analog "voystick" vocal joystick formant/pitch tracking:Voystick:https://github.com/elisaoh/mypystickVocal Joystick:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PXmccs4GIqIVocal Joystick Home Page:https://web.archive.org/web/20100626050314/http://ssli.ee.wa...University of Washington: Department of Linguistic: The Vocal Joystickhttps://linguistics.washington.edu/research/projects-and-gra...
